data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 3 advisory). Remediating: (1) round-trip contract test asserts ALL nine consumer-read fields (summary/description-ADF/status/priority/assignee/labels + comment/issuelinks/parent), not just the seam three; (2) add an explicit NEGATIVE test that feeds a pre-fix snapshot (comment under flat 'comments', issuelinks absent) and proves the consumer reads nothing — demonstrating the contract test would have caught bugs 0ee6/3f04; (3) tighten ACs via concrete worked assertions. Schema lives in _snapshot_schema.py (TypedDict + JSON Schema, validated with jsonschema 4.26).
